title: NIPGR Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Associate I, III Posts
description: The National Institute of Plant Genome Research (NIPGR) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Research Associate I and III Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech and Ph.D. students can apply for the NIPGR Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age...
